headline: Why Fortinet (FTNT) Outpaced the Stock Market Today
summary: In the closing of the recent trading day, Fortinet (FTNT) stood at $86.44, denoting a +2.53% move from the preceding trading day.

headline: Countdown to Fortinet (FTNT) Q1 Earnings: Wall Street Forecasts for Key Metrics
